data.content:
Branch: feat/foolery-c198-copilot-interactive-session
Commits: fbc53adf, b1dc4e76
Summary: Copilot now uses the shared interactive session runtime with session-mode transport, normalized result/session events, shared follow-up/abort semantics, and a follow-up watchdog reset fix for hung turns.
Validation: bun run lint (existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
